title: Handala’s attack on Israeli organizations ransomware incident

extortion.description: Handala’s attack on Israeli organizations Yesterday, after the problem occurred in CrowdStrike, Handala started a targeted phishing campaign ( https://twitter.com/x/status/1814658084460957890) using his dedicated wiper and FUD against thousands of Zionist organizations! So far, dozens of Zionist organizations have lost more than several terabytes of their data, and INCD (https://www.gov.il/he/pages/alert200724) is still unaware of a significant part…
